headline: First Solar, Inc. (FSLR) 2026 Guidance Disappoints Wall Street Firms, Triggers Downgrades
summary: First Solar, Inc. (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of the best solar stocks to buy now. First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) has a consensus rating of Moderate Buy from 24 analysts.
